title: onosma macrophylla
intro: Onosma macrophylla, also known as the large leaf onosma, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Onosma macrophylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Onosma macrophylla can be made into teas, infusions, or dried and used in capsules or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
